params.name: Holy Dragon Gem
params.description: When a Dragon is on the brink of death, the magic within its body condenses in its eyes, passing on its might to future generations. The power sealed within this gem is said to originate from the eyes of the divine dragon ancestor from millions of years ago. Although the gem seals the power, one can still faintly sense the ancient and profound draconic majesty from the aura it exudes.
